skills.description: Convert an existing implementation plan into Cartopian plan, phase, and task artifacts.
skills.applicability: Use when a structured plan already exists and requirements may remain external or summarized.

skills.description: Derive local Cartopian requirements from external source material.
skills.applicability: Use when requirements live outside the project and a local REQUIREMENTS.md is wanted.

skills.description: Check for a newer Cartopian release and upgrade the installed tree with approval.
skills.applicability: Use for an explicit update check or after the entry workflow reports a newer release.

skills.description: Close a completed plan and prepare the project for a fresh planning cycle.
skills.applicability: Use after plan work is complete and closeout, optional archival, and reset are due.

skills.description: Scaffold and register a new Cartopian project at an operator-chosen path.
skills.applicability: Use when creating a project or when the project registry is empty.

skills.description: Create global Cartopian configuration and verify the installed layout.
skills.applicability: Use for first-time workspace configuration; project setup is a separate workflow.

skills.description: Install or upgrade Cartopian and register its MCP server and entry bridge.
skills.applicability: Use when Cartopian is not installed or an approved upgrade must refresh the install.

skills.description: Advance a Cartopian project's internal protocol schema through shipped migrations.
skills.applicability: Use only after the operator requests or approves migration of a selected project.

skills.description: Build requirements, an implementation plan, phases, tasks, and specifications.
skills.applicability: Use for guided planning from scratch when an existing structured plan is not being adopted.

skills.description: Register Cartopian's MCP server and entry bridge with supported AI agents.
skills.applicability: Use after installation, when adding an agent, or when repairing client registration.

skills.description: Execute a Cartopian handoff and interpret its completion report.
skills.applicability: Use as the shared handoff workflow for task assignment, task review, or planning review.

skills.description: Drive one task through assignment, evidence, review policy, and supported closure.
skills.applicability: Use when the operator wants to start, continue, review, or close a task in the current plan.

skills.description: Open or resume a Cartopian PM session and route the next protocol action.
skills.applicability: Use for project-agnostic requests such as start working, continue, status, what's next, or resume.
Use when the operator says "use cartopian" or asks to start, resume, or manage a Cartopian-governed project session.

host_qualifications.direct_command: Delegates to the cartopian MCP server's use_cartopian prompt.
